content.text: Agora encontrei os arquivos. Vou ler os arquivos relevantes mencionados no plano.
Agora preciso verificar os tipos relacionados e como são usados em outros lugares. Vou também verificar os testes existentes e erros de lint atuais.

input.description: Run lint to see current errors

content.text: Excelente! Agora preciso verificar os tipos `AnyFunction` e `Key` usados, e como `compose` e os outros arquivos sao usados em testes para entender os padroes de uso.

content.content:
1→/**
     2→ * @file This file contains general-purpose utility types.
     3→ */
     4→
     5→import type { Compute } from './compute';
     6→
     7→/**
     8→ * Represents an object with string keys and values of any type.
     9→ */
    10→export type AnyRecord = { [K: string]: any };
    11→
    12→/**
    13→ * Represents an object with string keys and values of an unknown type.
    14→ * Safer than `AnyRecord`.
    15→ */
    16→export type UnknownRecord = { [K: string]: unknown };
    17→
    18→/**
    19→ * Extracts the resolved value type from a Promise.
    20→ * @example PromiseValue<Promise<number>> // => number
    21→ */
    22→export type PromiseValue<T> = T extends Promise<infer R> ? R : T;
    23→
    24→/**
    25→ * Represents a value that could be a Promise or a direct value.
    26→ */
    27→export type MaybePromise<T> = Promise<T> | T;
    28→
    29→/**
    30→ * Flattens a complex intersection type into a single object for better readability.
    31→ * @example
    32→ * type R = Simplify<{ a: number } & { b: number }>;
    33→ * // R is { a: number; b: number }
    34→ */
    35→export type Simplify<T> = [Exclude<T, BuiltIn>] extends [never]
    36→  ? T
    37→  : T extends ReadonlyArray<any>
    38→    ? T
    39→    : {
    40→        [K in keyof T as Ternary<IsKnown<T[K]>, K>]: T[K];
    41→      };
    42→
    43→/**
    44→ * Represents a function with any arguments and any return type.
    45→ */
    46→export type AnyFunction = ((...args: any) => any) | Function;
    47→
    48→/**
    49→ * Represents a value that can be a single item or an array of that item.
    50→ */
    51→export type MaybeArray<T> = T | T[];
    52→
    53→export type IsAny<T> = 0 extends 1 & T ? true : false;
    54→
    55→export type IsNever<T> = [T] extends [never] ? true : false;
    56→
    57→export type IsUnion<T, U = T> = T extends U ? ([U] extends [T] ? false : true) : never;
    58→
    59→export type IsNullable<T> = Extract<T, null | undefined> extends never ? false : true;
    60→
    61→export type IsOptional<T> = Extract<T, undefined> extends never ? false : true;
    62→
    63→export type IsUnknown<T> =
    64→  IsNever<T> extends false
    65→    ? T extends unknown
    66→      ? unknown extends T
    67→        ? IsAny<T> extends false
    68→          ? true
    69→          : false
    70→        : false
    71→      : false
    72→    : false;
    73→
    74→export type OnlyKnown<T> = IsKnown<T> extends true ? T : never;
    75→
    76→export type IsKnown<T> =
    77→  IsAny<T> extends true
    78→    ? false
    79→    : IsNever<T> extends true
    80→      ? false
    81→      : IsUnknown<T> extends true
    82→        ? false
    83→        : true;
    84→
    85→/**
    86→ * Returns Option if Value is not known.
    87→ *
    88→ * @example
    89→ * ```ts
    90→ * type num = CastUnknown<1, number>; // number
    91→ * type str1 = CastUnknown<'123', number>; // '123'
    92→ * type str2 = CastUnknown<'123', string>; // string
    93→ * ```
    94→ */
    95→export type CastUnknown<Value, Option, Coerce extends Boolean = true> = IsKnown<Value> extends true
    96→  ? IsUnknown<Value> extends false
    97→    ? Coerce extends true
    98→      ? [Exclude<Value, Option>] extends [never]
    99→        ? Option
   100→        : Value
   101→      : Value
   102→    : Option
   103→  : Option;
   104→
   105→export type Boolean = true | false;
   106→/**
   107→ * Shallow merge two types
   108→ * @example
   109→ * ```ts
   110→ *  type test = Merge<{ a: 1; b: 3 }, { a: 2; c: 8 }> // { a:2, b:3, c:8 }
   111→ * ```
   112→ */
   113→export type Merge<A, B, Level extends Depth = 'deep'> = //
   114→Level extends 'flat'
   115→  ? A & B
   116→  : A extends BuiltIn
   117→    ? Merge<B, {}>
   118→    : B extends BuiltIn
   119→      ? A
   120→      : {
   121→          [K in keyof A as K extends keyof B ? never : K]: A[K];
   122→        } & { [K in keyof B]: B[K] };
   123→
   124→export type Primitive = string | boolean | number | null | undefined | bigint | symbol;
   125→
   126→export type Serializable =
   127→  | Exclude<Primitive, bigint | symbol>
   128→  | { [K: string]: Serializable }
   129→  | ReadonlyArray<Serializable>;
   130→
   131→export type SerializableOnly<T> = {
   132→  [K in keyof T as T[K] extends Serializable ? K : never]: T[K] extends unknown ? T[K] : never;
   133→};
   134→
   135→export type SerializableKeys<T> = AsString<keyof SerializableOnly<T>>;
   136→
   137→export type Writable<T> =
   138→  T extends ReadonlyArray<any>
   139→    ? T
   140→    : {
   141→        -readonly [K in keyof T]: T[K] extends unknown ? T[K] : never;
   142→      };
   143→
   144→export type AsString<T> = T extends unknown ? (T extends string ? T : never) : never;
   145→
   146→/**
   147→ * Make some fields partial
   148→ * @example
   149→ *  PartialFields<{ id: string, email:string, meta: object }, ['id'], ['meta']>
   150→ *  // => id is now optional and meta was omitted:
   151→ *        { id?: string, email: string }
   152→ */
   153→export type PartialFields<
   154→  T,
   155→  Optionals extends (keyof T)[] = [],
   156→  Exclude extends (keyof T)[] = [],
   157→> = Simplify<
   158→  Omit<
   159→    {
   160→      [P in keyof T as P extends AsString<Optionals[number]> ? never : P]: T[P];
   161→    } & {
   162→      [K in AsString<Optionals[number]>]?: T[K extends keyof T ? K : never];
   163→    },
   164→    AsString<Exclude[number]>
   165→  >
   166→>;
   167→
   168→export type Depth = 'flat' | 'deep';
   169→
   170→export type Literal = string | number | bigint | boolean;
   171→
   172→export type BuiltIn =
   173→  | Literal
   174→  | Function
   175→  | Error
   176→  | Date
   177→  | { readonly [Symbol.toStringTag]: string }
   178→  | RegExp
   179→  | Generator;
   180→
   181→export type Has<U, U1> = [U1] extends [U] ? 1 : 0;
   182→
   183→export type If<B extends 0 | 1, Then, Else = never> = B extends 1 ? Then : Else;
   184→export type Ternary<B extends true | false, Then, Else = never> = B extends true ? Then : Else;
   185→
   186→export type Key = string | number | symbol;
   187→
   188→/**
   189→ * Converts a union of types into an intersection of those types.
   190→ * @example UnionToIntersection<{ a: 1 } | { b: 2 }> // => { a: 1 } & { b: 2 }
   191→ */
   192→export type UnionToIntersection<U> = (U extends unknown ? (k: U) => void : never) extends (
   193→  k: infer I,
   194→) => void
   195→  ? I
   196→  : never;
   197→
   198→export type ObjectEntries<T extends { [K: string]: any }> = {
   199→  [K in AsString<keyof T>]: [K, T[K]];
   200→}[AsString<keyof T>][];
   201→
   202→/**
   203→ * Converts nullable fields to optional fields
   204→ * @example:
   205→ *  NullableToPartial<{age: string|undefined}> // => { age?: string }
   206→ */
   207→export type NullableToPartial<T> =
   208→  //
   209→  T extends unknown
   210→    ? T extends Primitive
   211→      ? T
   212→      : Compute<
   213→          UnionToIntersection<
   214→            | {
   215→                -readonly [K in keyof T as IsOptional<T[K]> extends true ? never : K]-?: T[K];
   216→              }
   217→            | {
   218→                -readonly [K in keyof T as IsOptional<T[K]> extends true ? K : never]?: T[K];
   219→              }
   220→          >
   221→        >
   222→    : never;
   223→
   224→export type RemoveUnknownEntries<Obj> = {
   225→  [K in keyof Obj as [OnlyKnown<Obj>] extends [never] ? never : K]: OnlyKnown<Obj[K]>;
   226→};
   227→
   228→/**
   229→ * Join an array of values
   230→ * @example:
   231→ * type Str = Join<['a', 'b', 'c'], '#'>; // a#b#c
   232→ */
   233→export type Join<T extends unknown[], D extends string> = T extends []
   234→  ? ''
   235→  : T extends [string | number | null]
   236→    ? `${T[0]}`
   237→    : T extends [string | number | null, ...infer R]
   238→      ? `${T[0]}${D}${Join<R, D>}`
   239→      : string;
   240→
   241→/**
   242→ * Ask TS to re-check that `A1` extends `A2`.
   243→ * And if it fails, `A2` will be enforced anyway.
   244→ * Can also be used to add constraints on parameters.
   245→ * @param A1 to check against
   246→ * @param A2 to cast to
   247→ * @returns `A1 | A2`
   248→ * @example
   249→ * ```ts
   250→ * import {A} from 'ts-toolbelt'
   251→ *
   252→ * type test0 = A.Cast<'42', string> // '42'
   253→ * type test1 = A.Cast<'42', number> // number
   254→ * ```
   255→ */
   256→export type Cast<A1, A2> = A1 extends A2 ? A1 : A2;
   257→
